## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Apr 26, 2026 - Jul 14, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _QuizoidZ_, Jul 14, 2026, 1/5: "I love the layout, style, and customization. I prefer a “checklist” style which you can set by putting every goal at a 1/1, but it is interesting this kind of goal, things you do once a day, isn’t innate in the system. Also, the app keeps asking me to rate it… almost daily. Once is enough. 🤣 -1 ⭐️ This is a pretty cool app, but there’s some glitch where even after putting in my 5-star review it keeps asking for them. -1 ⭐️🤣🤣 -1 ⭐️ This is like every day 🤣🤣🤣 -1 ⭐️Now I’m down to one star. Maybe they’ll notice and turn off the constant review nagging. 🤣"
            2. _Krystynakris_, Apr 26, 2026, 3/5: "I’ve downloaded this app twice and deleted it twice because of the notification issues. Even after completing a habit, the reminders keep coming. I had one set for 6 a.m., and after I finished it, the habit disappeared from the app — so I had no way to delete or manage it anymore, yet the notifications kept coming for about a month. I also created another habit for a future date, but reminders started weeks too early. Really frustrating bug that makes the app hard to use. Please fix the notification system."
